# SpreadAPI

> SpreadAPI turns Excel spreadsheets into REST APIs. Upload an .xlsx file, define input and output cells, and get a live API endpoint. No coding required. Includes MCP Server for AI assistant integration.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://spreadapi.io/): Overview of SpreadAPI platform
- [How Excel API Works](https://spreadapi.io/how-excel-api-works): Step-by-step explanation of converting Excel to API
- [Excel to API](https://spreadapi.io/excel-to-api): Dedicated guide for converting spreadsheets to REST APIs
- [MCP Server for Excel](https://spreadapi.io/mcp-server): Connect AI assistants (Claude, ChatGPT) to Excel via Model Context Protocol
- [Excel AI Integration](https://spreadapi.io/excel-ai-integration): How AI assistants use spreadsheet calculations
- [Automation Calculations](https://spreadapi.io/automation-calculations): Excel calculations for Zapier, Make, n8n
- [Stop Rewriting Excel in Code](https://spreadapi.io/stop-rewriting-excel-in-code): Why you should use Excel as API instead of reimplementing formulas
- [On-Premises](https://spreadapi.io/on-premises): Self-hosted deployment with full data sovereignty
- [Security](https://spreadapi.io/security): Security model, compliance, data protection
- [Pricing](https://spreadapi.io/pricing): Free tier and paid plans
- [API Documentation](https://spreadapi.io/docs): REST API reference
- [SpreadAPI vs Google Sheets API](https://spreadapi.io/vs/google-sheets-api): Feature and pricing comparison
- [Blog](https://spreadapi.io/blog): Tutorials, guides, and comparisons

## What SpreadAPI Does

SpreadAPI is a B2B SaaS platform that:
- Converts Excel (.xlsx) spreadsheets into REST API endpoints
- Preserves all Excel formulas (VLOOKUP, PMT, SUMIFS, 500+ functions)
- Responds in 50-200ms per calculation
- Provides MCP (Model Context Protocol) Server for AI integration
- Supports ChatGPT, Claude Desktop, and any MCP-compatible client
- Offers on-premises deployment for regulated industries
- Generates OpenAPI specifications automatically

## API Overview

- Base URL: `https://spreadapi.io/api/v1`
- Execute calculation: `GET /services/{id}/execute?param1=value1`
- Get service definition: `GET /services/{id}/definition`
- Batch execution: `POST /services/{id}/batch`
- Authentication: API key via header or query parameter

## MCP Integration

SpreadAPI includes a built-in MCP Server. AI assistants can:
- Discover available spreadsheet services
- Call Excel calculations with typed parameters
- Receive structured results (JSON)
- Never access formulas or private data

MCP URL format: `https://spreadapi.io/api/mcp/service/{serviceId}`
